title: Looking for Category Manager at OYO Rooms

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at OYO Rooms
jsonLd.description:
Join the OYO Rooms family as a Category Manager in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OYO Rooms:
OYO Rooms is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms!
